---
title: "Section 1: Outbreak Context"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Outbreak Context](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">

            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>

        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
